title: SpiceJet is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: SpiceJet is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
SpiceJet is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SpiceJet:
SpiceJet is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
